sections.paragraph:
Original: אבּיר

Transliteration: 'abbı̂yr

Phonetic: ab-beer'

BDB Definition:

  1. mighty, valiant
    1. of men
    2. of angels
    3. of animals
    4. (metaphorically)
      1. of enemies
      2. of princes
      3. of sacrificial objects
    5. obstinate (figuratively)

Origin: for H46

TWOT entry: 13d

Part(s) of speech: Adjective Masculine
